experiments.name: url_lexical_comparisons
experiments.description: Trains and compares Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and XGBoost on lexical URL features.

experiments.name: nlp_muril_vs_bert
experiments.description: Fine-tunes and evaluates local scaled BertConfig architectures for MuRIL and IndicBERT model checkers.

experiments.name: fusion_meta_learner_ablation
experiments.description: Performs feature ablation studies on XGBoost Meta-Fusion and isolates single-channel degradation.

experiments.name: isotonic_regression_vs_platt
experiments.description: Evaluates probability calibration using Platt Scaling and Isotonic Regression, measuring ECE and Brier scores.

experiments.name: rag_precision_recall_groundedness
experiments.description: Measures retrieval precision, recall, answer groundedness, and citation coverage over the persistent RAG index.

experiments.name: statistical_significance_tests
experiments.description: Runs McNemar Chi-Squared, Wilcoxon Signed-Rank, and Bootstrap CI validation over model predictions.
